gluonts.notes: Time series forecasting. Statistical fallback. MAE 3.08, MAPE 2.59%.

twelve_data_etf_api.notes: ETF quotes, profiles, holdings. Needs TWELVE_DATA_API_KEY.

finrl_library.notes: 6 RL algos (PPO, A2C, DDPG). Real data via yfinance. No key needed.

tradier_api.notes: Options chains, quotes, tick data. Needs Tradier sandbox token.

nasdaq_data_link_fixed_income.notes: Treasury yields, bill rates, spreads. 403 without API key.

vettafi_etf_flows_tracker.notes: ETF flows, sector rotation, 15+ ETFs. Historical estimates.

bank_of_japan_open_data_portal.notes: JPY/USD 156.09, policy rate 1.0%. BOJ HTML scraping. Live data.

oecd_economic_indicators_dataset.notes: GDP, inflation, CLI. SDMX-JSON. Real data but API very slow (20-30s).

twelve_data_api.notes: Quotes, time series, FX. Demo key blocked. Needs TWELVE_DATA_API_KEY.

financial_modeling_prep_fmp_income_state.notes: Income statements, ratios, key metrics. Needs FMP_API_KEY.

openei_api.notes: Utility rates 500+ structures Con Edison. EV stations needs NREL key. Free.

eurostat_demographics_api.notes: DE pop 66yrs, unemployment 842 records, migration 16.9K records. Free.

openetf_flows_feed.notes: ETF flows. openetf.org unreachable, synthetic fallback with realistic patterns.

nvca_venture_monitor_dataset.notes: VC deal activity, exits, fundraising. NVCA.org blocks scraping, sample data.

imf_climate_linked_macro_dataset.notes: Climate-adjusted GDP via IMF WEO. Climate-specific endpoints use mock data.

pubchem_compound_api.notes: NIH chemistry DB. Aspirin C9H8O4, Ibuprofen C13H18O2. No key. Pharma/biotech analysis.

world_bank_climate_change_data_api.notes: 25 climate indicators, USA 17.4t CO2e/cap, GBR 1220mm precip. Free WB API.

nasa_power_api.notes: Solar/temp/wind/precip. NYC -0.11C Jan 2026. Global 1981-present. No key.

openweathermap_climate_api.notes: 6 commodities x 14 regions risk analysis. Needs OPENWEATHERMAP_API_KEY.

lightcast_open_skills_api.notes: Labor market skills taxonomy. Needs LIGHTCAST_CLIENT_ID/SECRET.

twelve_data.notes: AAPL $257.46, EUR/USD 1.16, BTC $67.8K. Demo key works. 800 calls/day free.

nasdaq_data_link_bonds.notes: 10Y Treasury 4.13%, curve normal, 2Y-10Y spread 0.56%. FRED fallback. Free.

eurostat_comext_api.notes: EU trade 88.7K data points, EU-US 115 pts. 500 queries/day. Free.

copernicus_data_space_ecosystem.notes: Sentinel-1/2/3/5P satellite catalog. Crop/shipping/ESG alt-data. Free OData.

eodhd_insider_data_api.notes: Insider trades, 13F. Demo key 404 on insider endpoints. Needs paid EODHD.

sensor_tower_app_intelligence_api.notes: App downloads, revenue, SDK, ad spend. 50 calls/mo free.

spac_tracker_api_by_spac_research.notes: SPAC tracker, mergers, redemptions, warrants. Needs SPAC_RESEARCH_API_KEY.

priori_data_app_intelligence_dataset.notes: iOS app intelligence via iTunes API. eToro 4.37 rating, ~557K downloads est.

apptweak_api.notes: ASO, keyword rankings, download estimates. Needs APPTWEAK_API_KEY.

data_ai_app_intelligence.notes: App market intel. iOS YouTube 4.68★ 46M ratings. 7/9 funcs free via iTunes.

factorflow_ml.notes: Factor investing ML. 10 Fama-French factors, correlation, exposure, portfolio construction.

nasdaq_emerging_markets.notes: NSE/BSE/HKEX/SSE. WAF blocks without key. Needs NASDAQ_DATA_LINK_API_KEY.

alphagenml.notes: ML alpha signal gen. 15 features, gradient boosting, backtest. sklearn fallback.
